note: seq=22 (PLACEHOLDER -- publish session local_713c255c: confirm last_seq+1, renumber seq + filename + sha-note, assign next-free seq, sign, push). GOLDEN RECORD + entity resolution -- review item 2, the canonical spine. Builds atlas.company_golden_record (canonical_id, legal+dba name, domain, website, address, city/state, phone, email, industry, naics/sic, platform, chat_status/provider, source_history jsonb, first/latest_seen, birth_signal_type, confidence, enrichment/qa/outreach/suppression/outcome status, outreach_ready, verify_status/reason) PROJECTED from the existing resolver clusters (atlas.business_canonical via atlas_entity_resolve.py) with a CONFIDENCE-GATED merge AND the CRITICAL name+geo CORROBORATION GUARD folded in: a generic-word small business (e.g. 'A&R Markets') can NEVER claim a national brand's domain (markets.com) by guess -- a single dictionary word / brand-denylist hit is never sufficient; only an explicit website, a registry domain, or a multi-token name appearing in the homepage title (geo-consistent) corroborates. Failing the guard DEMOTES the domain to a low-conf hint + flags verify_status=needs_reverify (reversible, non-destructive). Enforces 'outreach reads ONLY the golden record' via the atlas.outreach_pool VIEW (outreach_ready AND verify ok AND not suppressed AND has domain). Includes --backfill-flag to scan EXISTING rows for suspected false matches and flag them for re-verification without deleting. ADDITIVE: creates the golden table + outreach_pool view; reads business_canonical/field_provenance/source_record; never ALTERs/DROPs an existing table, never deletes; .gov/.mil suppression preserved. VERIFIED THIS SESSION (sandbox, no Postgres): py_compile clean; --selftest EXIT 0 with the GUARD asserts (A&R Markets->markets.com BLOCKED=single_token_unguarded; explicit/registry pass; title-phrase corroborates; geo-mismatch blocks) + merge-confidence gate (two strong signals=0.910>=0.55; lone fuzzy=0.450<0.55). VERIFY-ON-BOX: real cluster volume, real demotion/flag counts, the outreach_pool population. SHA-gated fetch + --migrate + --selftest gate before enabling the 10-min rebuild timer. Lands AFTER the entity resolver (business_canonical) exists.

steps.note: seq=22: golden record + entity resolution with name+geo corroboration guard (A&R Markets fix); outreach reads ONLY atlas.outreach_pool. Additive, reversible, guard-gated.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_golden_record.py':'d174ad1f37a9b9be5c4f1dd982a4eb4c22e148ed354464f071297a5faf3af902'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS golden record builder (canonical company spine; name+geo corroboration guard; outreach_pool view)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=11
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_golden_record.py
TimeoutStartSec=2h

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS golden record -- rebuild canonical spine every 10 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=6min
OnUnitActiveSec=10min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-golden-record.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
